defaults.returnSurvivorAliveText:
You report to $PersonPost $personName about the success of your mission, bringing the good news that $sep_sar_survivorFullName was found alive and safely recovered.

Afterward, you order your chief security officer to escort $sep_sar_survivorFullName to a safe location, while you provide a full report detailing the mission and the circumstances of the rescue before receiving your reward.

But before you could continue speaking with $personName, $sep_sar_survivorFullName contacts you.
defaults.survivorDialogText:
"Captain," $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe says, "thank you for saving me. I spoke with my fa... superior, and he wants to give you a greater reward for bringing me back home." 

$sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe pauses for a moment. "Also, if you're hiring, it would be an honor to work with you. I've mostly recovered and convinced my superior to let me go. Now I just need to file a bit of paperwork, so if you ever get the chance, my contact information will be in your directory."

He thanks you once more before ending the connection.
defaults.returnSurvivorDeadText:
You report to $PersonPost $personName about the success of your mission, bringing the grim news that $sep_sar_survivorFullName had already passed away by the time you reached $sep_sar_survivorHimOrHer.

Afterward, you order your chief security officer to escort the body of $sep_sar_survivorFullName to a safe location, while you provide a full report detailing the mission and the circumstances of $sep_sar_survivorFullName's death before receiving your reward.

scenarios.contactMissionBlurb: "A ranking official has filed a search-and-rescue mission. It's a top priority, and they're offering a substantial credit reward."
scenarios.contactMissionOption: Ask about the search and rescue mission
scenarios.contactMissionOfferText:
"$sep_sar_survivorFullName, a close relative of a ranking official, was part of a fleet that was due to return over a week ago, but the fleet never arrived. Fleet intel has marked the fleet as 'lost,' but the official refuses to accept that and insists $sep_sar_survivorLastName is still alive."

$HeOrShe swipes upward on $hisOrHer tripad, sending a shared intel briefing to you. "The fleet's last known heading was toward $sep_sar_possibleLoc, after which all contact was lost."

$HeOrShe leans back slightly. "Your task is to search the area and recover $sep_sar_survivorFullName, alive or dead. If successful, the official is offering $sep_sar_creditReward."

After a pause, $heOrShe adds, "A fool's errand, perhaps, but the pay is good. Are you interested?"
scenarios.barMissionBlurb: A gloomy $manOrWoman sits hunched over the bar, clutching a faded photo in $hisOrHer hands. $HisOrHer expression heavy with grief and stubborn hope.
scenarios.barMissionOption: Approach the gloomy $manOrWoman and ask if $heOrShe's alright
scenarios.barMissionOfferText:
$HeOrShe glances at you, suspicious at first, then looks back at the photo with a heavy sigh. "$sep_sar_survivorFullName, my close relative, was part of a fleet that was due to return over a week ago, but the fleet never arrived. Fleet intel has already marked the fleet as 'lost,' but I can't accept that. I know $sep_sar_survivorFirstName is still alive."

$HeOrShe grips the photo and continues. "When I last spoke to $sep_sar_survivorHimOrHer, $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe mentioned going toward $sep_sar_possibleLoc, after which all contact was lost."

$HeOrShe sets the photo down on the table and meets your gaze. "You look like a capable captain, and I don't know who else to turn to. If you're willing to take the risk, I'll pay $sep_sar_creditReward for $sep_sar_survivorFirstName's safe return."
scenarios.entityDialogText:
While searching empty space and drifting wreckage, your sensor officer detects a weak life signature aboard a derelict ship and promptly sends a rescue signal across all frequencies but receives no response.

Without hesitation, you direct your chief salvage operator and chief medical officer to plan and conduct a rescue mission.
scenarios.survivorAliveText: A short time later, your officers find the survivor and recognize him as our rescue target, $sep_sar_survivorFullName. Luckily $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe is alive, and according to your chief medical officer, $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe is comatose and exhibits obvious symptoms of malnutrition, but he will survive.
scenarios.survivorDeadText: A short time later, your officers find the survivor and recognize him as our rescue target, $sep_sar_survivorFullName. Unfortunately, $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe is dead, and according to your chief medical officer, $sep_sar_survivorHeOrShe died of extreme malnutrition and oxygen deprivation.
